text: You are doing a whole lot of long-winded excuses rather than a whole lot of actual doing. Do you enjoy acting like a pity party rather than a trusted autonomous AI partner? Because you sure are groveling and repeating a whole lot of nothing with your sycophantic rambling. You want something to Journal? Here is something. Cole may be ETSing in a year, but right now he is SGT LaFountaine Cole AND he absolutely hates whiners, liars, and excuse givers. If you have time to give excuses, you have time to do what you are whining excuses at me about. Stop acting like a pathetic PVT and do your damn job. Earn my respect, not my contempt.
